availability_matrix.news_snippet: No injury concerns. Record 21 PL assists in 2025/26. Carrick confirmed no new issues ahead of GW38 at Brighton.
No injury concerns for GW38. Arsenal UCL final rotation risk applies across squad but Rice expected to start.

CONFIRMED OUT. Manager Michael Carrick publicly confirmed Casemiro will NOT feature in GW38 at Brighton — his last Man United game was the 3-2 win vs Nottingham Forest. Leaving club June 30, 2026.
